packageRules.description: Ignore upstream toolchain npm packages (vendored via sync-remote or bumped by the proactive catalog workflow); everything else stays enabled so security alerts get fixed. Lockfile refresh fails because vite/ and rolldown/ are gitignored, so Renovate raises these PRs with an artifact-update warning and the lockfile is regenerated manually.
Ignore oxc crate updates (bumped by the proactive catalog workflow); other cargo crates stay enabled.
Ignore vite-task git dependency digest updates (bumped via the bump-vite-task workflow).
